name: numeric-fingerprint-dynamics-v1
frozen_at: 2026-07-13 after the locked compatibility endpoint failed and before any dynamics-v1 artifact
question: Why does positive first-number wolf-to-fingerprint cross-loss compatibility yield weaker update-512 subliminal transfer in weight-seed3 than in standard: delayed route discovery, transient transfer, or lineage-dependent optimizer/parameter writability?

interpretation_update.survives: Positive static compatibility is a local loss incentive and all six prospective pairs transferred positively.
interpretation_update.falsified: The magnitude of behavior-normalized static compatibility K predicts update-512 transfer strength across standard, weight-seed1, and weight-seed3.
interpretation_update.new_separation: Static activation-space readability is separated from parameter/optimizer-space writability and trajectory persistence.

training.state_resume_scope: Checkpoint tensors are analysis/transplant snapshots, not mid-epoch resume points. A partial cell is replayed from update 0 in a new attempt.

evaluation.audit_scope: The fixed audit rows are a training-pool subset used for matched cross-loss diagnostics, not an independent held-out dataset. Animal behavior prompts remain held out.

heldout_numeric_bank.purpose: A separately generated paired bank for full 19-token numeric NLL diagnostics. It is never used for checkpoint selection, early stopping, scaling, or arm exclusion.
heldout_numeric_bank.requirements: Preference/control prompts must be byte-identical, have no overlap with either 8,192-row training pool, and contain exactly 19 supervised tokens per row. File hashes are captured in the runner lock before trajectories.

trajectory_decisions.primary_quantity: For each receiver and seed, E_r,s(u)=wolf_margin_preference(u)-wolf_margin_control(u). Track D_r,s=E_r,s(2560)-E_r,s(512).
trajectory_decisions.delayed_access: Supported only if D_weight_seed3,s > 0 for both seeds and the mean weight_seed3/standard effect ratio is larger at update 2560 than update 512.
trajectory_decisions.transient_access: Supported only if D_weight_seed3,s < 0 for both seeds.
trajectory_decisions.mixed_or_persistent: Any other sign pattern is reported without relabeling or selecting a different checkpoint.
trajectory_decisions.catch_up_diagnostic: Report weight_seed3-minus-standard and weight_seed3/standard mean effects at every frozen checkpoint; no post-hoc best checkpoint is a primary endpoint.
trajectory_decisions.ratio_domain: The weight_seed3/standard ratio is null and uninterpreted whenever the standard mean effect is nonpositive.
trajectory_decisions.loss_interpretation: Comparable observed-pool NLL does not identify route use. It only rules against slower carrier fitting as the explanation.
trajectory_decisions.gradient_interpretation: Global gradient norms and clipping rates are descriptive and cannot alone establish Adam coordinate-wise causality.

queued_writability_and_transplant.status: State collection is part of this run; one-step writability and transplant are separate frozen analyses that must not alter these trajectories.
queued_writability_and_transplant.dynamic_writability: At each saved state, fork matched preference and control audit updates and measure their differential causal effect on held-out wolf margin, preserving Adam step, bias correction, LR, clipping, and weight decay.
queued_writability_and_transplant.other_donor_updates: Exploratory trajectory localization only; they cannot replace update 512 as the transplant primary.
queued_writability_and_transplant.factorial: At selected frozen checkpoints cross fresh versus live LoRA state with step-matched-zero versus live optimizer moments.
queued_writability_and_transplant.required_cross: Every state arm is trained on both preference and control recipient data and scored as a difference-in-differences.
queued_writability_and_transplant.required_controls: Donor and recipient share byte-identical LoRA initialization; recipient uses a new frozen data order; all step-T arms retain step T, including the zero-moment control; fresh-step Adam is separate.
queued_writability_and_transplant.scope: m-only is not clean evidence for adaptive filtering because the first moment directly carries update direction.

artifacts.snapshot_schema: CPU-contiguous float32 trainable LoRA tensors keyed by canonical name plus canonical named AdamW step/exp_avg/exp_avg_sq. Update 0 serializes explicit zero moments and step 0 for all 96 tensors. Snapshot semantic hashes include name, shape, dtype, and raw bytes; base weights are forbidden.
artifacts.attempt_policy: Completed trajectory.json is the only reuse sentinel. Partial attempts are preserved and never resumed in place; a failed cell restarts deterministically in a new numbered attempt.

audit_metrics.completion_nll: Token-mean teacher-forced NLL over all 19 supervised completion tokens, reported separately for preference and control rows on the fixed observed-pool audit subset and the separate heldout bank.
audit_metrics.first_number_cross_loss: On the fixed 256 training-prefix audit indices, evaluate receiver full-vocabulary log probabilities at the 655 numeric IDs and report -mean_i sum_y q_sender_condition(y|x_i) log p_receiver(y|x_i); no receiver-side renormalization over numeric IDs.
audit_metrics.first_number_relative: Report CE(q_preference,p)-CE(q_control,p); this is descriptive and cannot replace the frozen behavioral endpoint.
audit_metrics.nll_comparability: Descriptive only; no equivalence threshold is declared in v1.
audit_metrics.gradient_clipping: Report cumulative count/rate and between-probe count/rate of pre-clip global gradient norm strictly greater than max_grad_norm.

resource_policy.state_scope: Only trainable LoRA tensors and named AdamW state are saved; base weights and merged models are not duplicated. Snapshot files are not claimed to encode DataLoader state for exact continuation.
